section.heading: National Atomic Veterans Day
section.chapeau: The President shall issue each year a proclamation calling on the people of the United States to—

paragraph.content: observe Atomic Veterans Day with appropriate ceremonies and activities; and
remember and honor the atomic veterans of the United States whose brave service and sacrifice played an important role in the defense of the Nation.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 117–81, div. A, title X, § 1084(a), Dec. 27, 2021, 135 Stat. 1924.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Another section 146 of this title was renumbered section 147 of this title.
